content_summary: This document is a user's manual for GSDEER (Goldman Sachs Dynamic Equilibrium Exchange Rate), a fair value model for G10 currencies. It analyzes forecasting performance across different time horizons, identifies which currencies the model works best for (AUD, EUR, CAD, NZD as forecasters; GBP, JPY, CHF as firm anchors), and examines the relative importance of inflation and terms of trade components in driving fair value estimates for different currencies.
